pi_items.source: setup_task.sh explicitly copies the Rdataset /opt/jamovi_datasets/InsectSprays.csv to this target dataset path.

privileged_info_summary: The task requires generating an ANOVA contrast report using the real-world Rdatasets 'InsectSprays.csv', which contains 72 observations of insect counts across 6 spray types. The target output paths are /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/Spray_Contrasts.omv for the Jamovi project and /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/contrast_report.txt for the text report. To pass the programmatic test, the reference level of 'spray' must be set to 'F', and the simple contrast comparison between 'C' and 'F' yields a t-statistic of approximately -9.11 (-9.116 in the verifier script).
